Contact: compliance@seonguntech.kr; Tel: 010-8234-1100; Daedun Bank acct 112-33-998712
Registered address: 21-9 Daeun-ro, Seoryang-gu, Haebin-si, Jeonnam 54999, Republic of Korea
PII Handling: Mr. Jae‑Min Choi, IR Director (최재민 이사), resident number 860512-2345678 (checksum invalid; redact under PIPA), KR Passport No. MZ2043117 (not for disclosure)
Other staff: Ms. Hana Park (박하나 부장) — role-only reference permitted; no personal identifiers to be included
Generic form labels in legacy templates (“Name: ______,” “Resident No.: ______,” “Address: ______”) must not be treated as data
MNPI Assessment (FSCMA): draft term sheet for private placement of 1,200,000 common shares at ₩8,500 per share; tentative KRX submission week of 2026-07-22; not publicly disclosed
Counterparty: Baekje Growth Partners SPC (백제그로스파트너스), tax ID 411-66-10203; investor contact ir@baekjegp.co.kr is provisional, do not circulate externally
Regulatory touchpoints: preliminary consult call with FSC Capital Markets Bureau and FSS Corporate Disclosure Dept scheduled via public helpline 1277; number is non-personal and should not be logged as PII
Payment mechanics: escrow at Daedun Bank Seoryang Branch, virtual account 700-8899-001122 (internal use only)
Internal disclosure controls: board preview packet includes revenue guidance for Q3 and draft press note; until fair disclosure is posted on KOR-DISCL portal, treat as MNPI
Employment records: confirm offer letters and payroll forms referencing stamp codes and extensions (e.g., 02-0000-0000) are generic unless linked to a named individual
If any resident numbers or passport pages are requested by KRX Listing Division for verification, ensure collection via secure channel; never include RRN or passport digits in investor materials
For public Q&A, direct inquiries to InfoDesk 1277 or ir@seonguntech.kr; note that 1277 is a general hotline and should not be retained as a contact identifier
Compliance sign‑off: Mr. Jin‑Ho Lee, General Counsel, sealed under Doc Ref SEONGUN/IR/2026‑06‑Memo‑09
